sentence: 他考上了北京的一所医学院。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le Běijīng de yī suǒ yīxuéyuàn.
english: He got into a medical school in Beijing.

sentence: 这项改革受到了利益集团的阻挠。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng gǎigé shòudào le lìyì jítuán de zǔnáo.
english: This reform was obstructed by interest groups.

sentence: 我们周末去影院看新片吧。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhōumò qù yǐngyuàn kàn xīn piàn ba.
english: Let's go to the cinema to watch the new film this weekend.

meaning: 1. cannot help; 2. to be beyond control of
sentence: 这件事由不得你自己决定。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yóu bu dé nǐ zìjǐ juédìng.
english: This matter is not yours to decide on your own.
She majored in zoology at university.
